'''Jodar Frein''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Near-Human]] who served as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] and [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Sandwind Team (Sriluur)|Sandwind Team]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]]. He was known to be a veteran of several battles during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Char-stub}}
